content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column width=”2/3″ css=”.vc_custom_1543924365737{padding-right: 25px !important;padding-left: 25px !important;}”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner]

Exoxemis as a Partner

[vc_column_text]Applying highest quality science, research, and development to our partnerships and collaborations.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_tta_accordion style=”insignia_accordion_layout1″ active_section=”1″][vc_tta_section title=”Exoxemis as a Partner” tab_id=”1543992336291-44a1363c-3496″][vc_column_text]Exoxemis is focused on the development of haloperoxidase enzyme-based products to address the increasing threat of serious and drug-resistant infections. We are committed to:

  • Leveraging expertise in enzymology, bioanalytical methods, microbiology,
    and formulation sciences to bring new products to market.
  • Applying highest quality science, research, and development to our
    partnerships and collaborations.
  • Supporting scholarship and innovation in evolving applications of
    our technology.
  • Targeting product opportunities to address areas of high, unmet clinical
    demand, and strong potential market growth.
  • Extending the application of the myeloperoxidase and eosinophil peroxidase
    technology platform to a wide variety of medical, veterinary, agricultural,
    disinfectant, and industrial applications.
  • Offering flexibility in formulation to accommodate multiple indications
    and provide a cGMP-manufactured product
  • Delivering value to partners and collaborators.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][/vc_tta_accordion][vc_empty_space height=”40px”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner]

  • Collaboration
  • Parter
[vc_empty_space height=”30px”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner disable_element=”yes” css=”.vc_custom_1567538848165{margin-right: 0px !important;margin-left: 0px !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}”][vc_column_inner css=”.vc_custom_1545465991318{padding-top: 25px !important;padding-right: 30px !important;padding-bottom: 35px !important;padding-left: 30px !important;background-image: url(https://insigniathemes.com/clariwell/inner-pages/wp-content/uploads/sites/9/2018/12/iconbox-bg-04-1.jpg?id=14702) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}”]

Opening Hours

[vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1543927959888{margin-bottom: 20px !important;}”]

Visit us at our headquarters for a free consulting hour.

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_empty_space height=”50px”][vc_row_inner disable_element=”yes” css=”.vc_custom_1567538870394{margin-right: 0px !important;margin-left: 0px !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}”][vc_column_inner css=”.vc_custom_1544188725729{padding-top: 25px !important;padding-right: 30px !important;padding-bottom: 35px !important;padding-left: 30px !important;background-color: #f3f7f9 !important;}”]

Exoxemis - a biomedical research company focused on the study and commercialization of a topical biological antiseptic system utilizing Myeloperoxidase (MPO).
@graph.description: Myeloperoxidase (MPO) and eosinophil peroxidase (EPO) enzymes work to preferentially kill a broad range of pathogens through a unique mechanism of action unlikely to induce resistance.
